# Ferni AI - robots.txt
# https://ferni.ai

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemaps
Sitemap: https://ferni.ai/sitemap.xml

# Disallow admin/internal paths
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_site/

# Allow important crawlers
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

# Crawl delay for politeness
Crawl-delay: 1
